name: Trevor Noah
bio: Trevor Noah is a South African comedian, writer, and television host known for incisive material on race, identity, and language drawn from growing up in apartheid South Africa. After building a stand-up career in South Africa, he hosted Comedy Central's The Daily Show from 2015 to 2022. His Netflix specials include Afraid of the Dark and Son of Patricia, and his memoir Born a Crime was widely acclaimed.

timeline.ev: Releases the South African special The Daywalker
First South African comedian to appear on The Tonight Show
Becomes host of Comedy Central's The Daily Show
Publishes the acclaimed memoir Born a Crime
Releases the Netflix special Son of Patricia

accolades: Host of The Daily Show, 2015 to 2022
Grammy Award winner and acclaimed memoirist for Born a Crime
